steps.title: Follow the award clue
steps.content: The sentence says it was “not a surprise” that the book received a Newbery Honor. That means readers had responded positively, so the blank needs a word that pairs with “enjoyed” and helps explain the award.

steps.title: Choose the positive response
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D are negative responses, which would make the award surprising. Choice B does not fit because readers do not create the book they read. The remaining word names a positive reaction that supports the award context. The answer is C.
